title: Mount image fails with imagestores
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Fall back to creating a new builder with it if MountImage() fails on the base image, because when the store is configured with its "imagestore" option, that can happen.

#### How to verify it

New integration test.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Podman's e2e tests exercise the imagestore storage option, and we haven't previously.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
